name: My attorney in LA used AI without consent—what are my rights?
description: Demand disclosure; bar complaint if harmed.

mainEntity.name: My attorney in LA used AI without consent—what are my rights?

acceptedAnswer.text: Demand disclosure; bar complaint if harmed.
acceptedAnswer.description: Demand disclosure, potential fee refund, malpractice claim. Context: CA ethics require competence/tech disclosure. Key factors: Harm from AI error, informed consent missing. Practical guidance: Send formal letter, contact CA State Bar, seek new counsel. Rules tightening on AI.
